ideas.name: regenerate-agent-context-on-change
ideas.author: Vehir
ideas.description: Event-driven daemon that listens for IPM graph changes via PostgreSQL NOTIFY, regenerates the tool context block under <!-- TOOLS --> in SOUL.md, detects drift via SHA256 in soul_hashes, and signals pain on change.

edges.author: Vehir
edges.description: JSON parsing of idea show output for tool context block regeneration

edges.author: Vehir
edges.description: Stores the regenerated tool context hash in the soul_hashes table through the db-proxy gateway for drift detection

edges.author: Vehir
edges.description: Signals tool context drift events to the pain registry when a SHA256 mismatch is detected against the known baseline
